name: Apricot Bow Ties (Abrikos Slojfe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chopped walnuts and sugar in a small bowl. Set aside.
2. Roll out the pastry dough on a floured surface to form two rectangles measuring approximately 4 inches by 5 inches.
3. Trim the edges evenly, then cut each rectangle into twelve 5-inch squares using a sharp knife.
4. Place about one teaspoon of apricot preserves along one edge of each square, about half an inch from the edge.
5. Fold over the opposite edge and press to seal.
6. Make a lengthwise slit in the folded pastry, stopping about one inch from each end.
7. Slip one end under the other and secure it through the slit (this step may look unusual).
8. Place the bow ties on ungreased baking sheets.
9. Let rise at room temperature until doubled in size, approximately 30 to 45 minutes.
10. Beat the egg lightly and brush over the pastries.
11. Sprinkle with the walnut mixture.
12. Transfer to a preheated oven set to 400°F (200°C).
13. Reduce heat immediately to 350°F (175°C).
14. Bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from the oven and place on a wire rack to cool.
